name: ruby-http-parser
title: ruby-http-parser
description:
Ruby FFI bindings to http-parser
A super fast http parser for ruby.
This gem will compile a local copy of http-parser.
.
Cross platform and multiple ruby implementation support
thanks to ffi.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-http-parser because Ruby FFI bindings to http-parser.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-http-parser as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-http-parser with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-http-parser --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
